---
title: "Genomics Pipeline — Variant Calling Report"
params:
  vcf: NA
  stats: NA
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(DT)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

## Summary

```{r summary}
if (file.exists("vcf_summary.csv")) {
  summary <- read.csv("vcf_summary.csv")
  knitr::kable(summary, col.names = c("Metric", "Value"))
}
```

## Annotation Overlap

```{r annotation}
if (file.exists("annotation_summary.csv")) {
  annot <- read.csv("annotation_summary.csv")
  ggplot(annot, aes(x = category, y = count, fill = category)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    labs(title = "Variant Annotation Overlap", x = "Region", y = "Count") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
}
```

## Quality Distributions

### QUAL Score

```{r qual}
if (file.exists("qual_dist.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("qual_dist.png")
}
```

### Depth Distribution

```{r depth}
if (file.exists("depth_dist.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("depth_dist.png")
}
```

### Chromosome Distribution

```{r chrom}
if (file.exists("chrom_dist.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("chrom_dist.png")
}
```

## bcftools Stats

```{r stats, results='asis'}
if (!is.na(params$stats) && file.exists(params$stats)) {
  stats_lines <- readLines(params$stats)
  cat("<pre><code>")
  cat(stats_lines, sep = "\n")
  cat("</code></pre>")
}
```

## Session Info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
